details.message: memory_bank/ directory missing. Expected top-level directories: src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/. All present except memory_bank/ (MEMORY_BANK.md file exists at root but not the directory).
memory_bank/ directory does not exist so key governance docs cannot be verified inside it. .cursor/automations/ exists with README and specs. reports/audit/ and reports/board/ exist.

moltbot/ directory still exists at repo root with active Python code (sentinel.py, board.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py). Per audit docs (CLAWDBOT_REMOVAL_DEPLOY_PROOF.md, CLAWDBOT_REMOVAL_CHANGELOG.md), this should have been removed.

Moltbot/molt references found in code/config (excluding reports/audit and docs): moltbot/ directory (5 .py files), scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py.
